rules.summary: Use the `three-dollar-in-my-pocket-debug` scheme for Debug builds.
Use the `three-dollar-in-my-pocket` scheme for Release builds.
Run SwiftLint validation after writing code.
rules.trigger_intent: finishing code changes and choosing the validation command to run
rules.evidence: 코드 작성 후 반드시 SwiftLint 검증 수행

rules.summary: Do not edit generated `.xcodeproj` files directly.
Make every screen ViewModel follow the documented Input, Output, Route, Config, Dependency, and State structure.
rules.trigger_intent: creating a ViewModel for a screen
rules.evidence: 모든 화면(ViewController)용 ViewModel은 아래 구조를 반드시 따릅니다

rules.summary: Make every ViewController inherit from BaseViewController and import Common.
rules.evidence: 모든 ViewController는 BaseViewController를 상속합니다 (Common 모듈에서 `import Common` 필요)

rules.trigger_intent: wiring a ViewModel into a ViewController

rules.summary: Separate route handling into an extension.
rules.trigger_intent: implementing route handling in a ViewController

rules.summary: Build UI only in code and use SnapKit for Auto Layout.
rules.trigger_intent: creating a user interface or its Auto Layout constraints
rules.evidence: **코드 기반 UI만 사용** - SnapKit으로 Auto Layout 구성

rules.summary: Use leading and trailing rather than left and right in SnapKit constraints.
rules.trigger_intent: writing or changing SnapKit horizontal constraints
rules.evidence: SnapKit 사용 시 left, right 대신 leading, trailing을 사용합니다

rules.summary: Use DesignSystem resources exclusively for colors, fonts, icons, buttons, and similar UI elements.
rules.trigger_intent: adding or changing colors, fonts, icons, buttons, or other UI resources
rules.evidence: 색상, 폰트, 아이콘, 버튼 등은 반드시 DesignSystem(Colors, Fonts, Icons 등)으로만 사용합니다

rules.summary: Do not use the `then` library in new code; use standard Swift syntax.
rules.trigger_intent: creating new Swift code that initializes and configures an object
rules.evidence: **신규 코드에서 `then` 라이브러리 사용 금지** - Swift 표준 문법(클로저, var/let 선언 후 속성 설정 등)을 사용합니다

rules.summary: Implement every API as an enum extended to conform to RequestType.
rules.evidence: 모든 API는 enum + RequestType 프로토콜 확장으로 구현합니다

rules.summary: Split repositories into Protocol and Impl types.
Match API, Repository, and Model names to the server-defined names.
rules.trigger_intent: naming an API, Repository, or Model declaration
rules.evidence: API/Repository/Model 네이밍은 서버에서 정의한 네이밍과 동일하게 정의합니다

rules.summary: Make every new UICollectionViewCell inherit from BaseCollectionViewCell.
rules.evidence: 새로 생성하는 모든 UICollectionViewCell은 반드시 BaseCollectionViewCell을 상속합니다

rules.summary: Do not add static registerId or reuseIdentifier properties inside cells.
rules.trigger_intent: adding a static registration or reuse identifier property to a collection-view cell
rules.evidence: 셀 내부에 registerId(혹은 reuseIdentifier)와 같은 static 프로퍼티를 별도로 생성하지 않습니다 (registerId 사용 금지)

rules.summary: Use UIKit only; do not use SwiftUI.
rules.evidence: SwiftUI 사용 안 함 - UIKit만 사용
